summary: Phase 4A High-Value Cleanup for Compliance File UI - All features tested and working correctly. Top Action Bar with 4 buttons (Upload Evidence, Request Missing Items, Enter Check, Export), Enter Check dropdown with 4 check types, RecordCheckDialog opens correctly, Training Summary Card shows completion status with Manage Training link, What's Needed Panel displays blocking items with Request All Missing button, All Files tab removed from navigation (7 tabs now), Compact Status Panel shows work readiness.
critical_code_review_comments: ComplianceActionBar correctly implements all 4 action buttons with proper data-testid attributes
Enter Check dropdown uses DropdownMenu from radix-ui with 4 check types (RTW, DBS, Identity, Address)
RecordCheckDialog opens correctly when clicking Enter Check options
TrainingSummaryCard shows completion status (6/6 completed) with Complete badge and Manage Training link
WhatsNeededPanel displays blocking items in red section with Request All Missing button
All Files tab (value='documents') correctly removed from TabsList - now shows 7 tabs
Compact Status Panel shows work readiness with blocking reasons when NOT_READY
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data for employee d88335f6-1b18-435a-8086-28af4a583f77
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4A High-Value Cleanup fully tested. All new components working: ComplianceActionBar (4 buttons), Enter Check dropdown (4 check types), RecordCheckDialog, TrainingSummaryCard (6/6 completed, Manage Training link), WhatsNeededPanel (4 blocking items, Request All Missing button). Tab navigation shows 7 tabs (All Files removed). Compact Status Panel shows NOT_READY with blocking reasons.

upload_evidence_button.details: Upload Evidence button found with data-testid='action-upload-evidence'

request_missing_items_button.details: Request Missing Items button found with badge showing count (6)

enter_check_dropdown.details: Enter Check button found with data-testid='action-enter-check', dropdown shows 4 check types

enter_check_options.details: All 4 check types found: RTW, DBS, Identity, Address with correct data-testid attributes

record_check_dialog.details: RecordCheckDialog opens when clicking Enter Check option, shows Check Method, Date Checked, Outcome, Certificate Number, Review Due Date, Notes fields

export_button.details: Export button found with data-testid='action-export-file', enabled and clickable

training_summary_card.details: TrainingSummaryCard found with data-testid='training-summary-card', shows 'Training Status', 'Complete' badge, '6/6 completed', 'Manage Training' link

manage_training_navigation.details: Clicking Training Summary Card navigates to Training tab

whats_needed_panel.details: WhatsNeededPanel found with data-testid='whats-needed-panel', shows 'What's Needed' header

blocking_items_display.details: 4 blocking items displayed in red section: Recruitment not approved, Reference 1 required, Reference 2 required, Address Verification: 1/2 verified

request_all_missing_button.details: Request All Missing button found with data-testid='request-all-missing-btn'

all_files_tab_removed.details: Tab navigation shows 7 tabs (Overview, Compliance File, Policies, Training, Audit Log, Recruitment, Recurring) - All Files tab removed

compact_status_panel.details: Status panel shows 'Not Ready to Work' with blocking reasons when employee is NOT_READY
